features.name: blackbox module with smt2_model attribute
features.description: Code should include a blackbox module declaration with a smt2_model attribute containing SMTLIB2 expressions as a string
features.snippet:
(* smt2_model =
    "(= ((_ to_fp 8 24) s) (fp.add RNE ((_ to_fp 8 24) a) ((_ to_fp 8 24) b)))"
*)
module fadd(input [31:0] a, b, output [31:0] s);
endmodule

features.name: module attribute with multi-line string concatenation
features.description: Code should include a module-level attribute with a string value using brace concatenation syntax for multi-line SMTLIB2 expressions
